value:
v1.11.1 release in flight, pending soak.

STATUS:
v1.11.1-beta.8 fully validated as freeze-free across three independent layers:
1. Test suite: 1226/1226 green (includes the d773c4d proto-poisoning regression test asserting Object.prototype stays clean)
2. Live MCP test: all 19 tools exercised including the historical parallel-bulk-scan freeze pattern
3. Stress test (scripts/stress-test.mjs): ~42k tool calls across three configs, zero errors, zero timeouts, max latency 77ms

The three beta-cycle freeze causes are addressed and have grep recipes in context.mcpServerFreezeDiagnosis if a fourth ever surfaces.

NEXT STEPS (priority order):
1. Soak beta.8 with normal usage ~24h. Abort the release if any freeze appears.
2. Tag v1.11.1: bump package.json version, draft CHANGELOG from the four beta.8 commit messages (d773c4d fix(telemetry), 1810fc2 perf(audit), b803683 perf(store), 4ef3800 fix(mcp)), git tag v1.11.1, push origin main + tag.
3. File a GitHub follow-up issue for context.logQueryOnCost — sibling perf characteristic to v1.12.0 #57 (audit/stats query iterates the full in-memory log array O(N); not freeze-class but worth tracking).
4. Draft + publish the dogfooding post: codexCLI stress-tested itself, found and fixed three freezes, stored the findings in itself for future agents. AFTER stable tag, not before.

REFERENCES:
- context.mcpServerFreezeDiagnosis — three-cause diagnosis with grep recipes
- context.cascadeDelete — removeEntry auto-cleans aliases + confirm metadata
- context.logQueryOnCost — audit/stats O(N) iteration finding
- scripts/stress-test.mjs — the validation tool, env knobs documented in header
- project.v112 — the next release milestone (#57 #41 #68)
